proposal_summary: This proposal establishes the Arbitrum Research & Development Collective (ARDC) for a 6-month term with a budget of 1,761,000 ARB. The ARDC will feature elected roles (DAOAdvocate, Risk, Security, Research) to review governance proposals, conduct security reviews, and provide economic risk analyses.

disclosed_entities.name: Blockworks Research
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This proposal intends on forking the Arbitrum Coalition proposal that was submitted & spearheaded by Blockworks Research, Gauntlet & Trail of Bits on the 25th of October 2023

disclosed_entities.name: Gauntlet
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Blockworks Research, Gauntlet & Trail of Bits

disclosed_entities.name: Trail of Bits
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Blockworks Research, Gauntlet & Trail of Bits

disclosed_entities.name: ImmutableLawyer
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: @Immutablelawyer will be announcing the starting date of the election process.

disclosed_entities.name: ARB token
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: token holders of the ARB token with the following contract address [0x912CE59144191C1204E64559FE8253a0e49E6548]

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum Foundation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: with the Arbitrum Foundation serving as a counterparty to the Agreement.

disclosed_entities.name: ARDC Multisig
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The ARDC’s 3/5 multisig is being created.

disclosed_entities.name: Hedgey
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Streaming of funds to the multi-sig every second week for the ARDC’s term using Hedgey.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Funds the ARDC multisig for a 6 month term
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Fund the ARDC with 1.715 Million ARB + Multi-Sig Budget for a 6-Month Term.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal requires setting up a multisig, streaming funds via Hedgey, holding an election process, but the on-chain execution itself is likely just transferring funds and streaming setup.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Streaming of funds to the multi-sig every second week for the ARDC’s term using Hedgey.

limitations: No precise addresses other than ARB provided.
